name: Path of Exile
description: Build analysis and modification via headless Path of Building — paste a build link or iterate on existing builds
limitations: Build analysis only — no live character data yet (GGG API access pending)
Timeless jewel calculations are not supported

build_planner.name: Build Planner
build_planner.description: Analyze, modify, or explore a Path of Exile build via Path of Building. First call returns a compact summary with per-element damage breakdown (FireHitAverage, ChaosHitAverage, etc.) showing damage type split after conversion — check these before recommending element-specific changes. Items section includes rare/magic item mod text for understanding gear-based conversion. To drill deeper, call again with buildId and sections (e.g. 'offense,defense'). For modifications, pass buildId + operations. For tree exploration, pass buildId + nearby_metrics. Every response includes a buildId for follow-up calls.
